comment.body: The Takeaway: The market required domestic funds (Directs) to heavy-lift this supply because broad/foreign demand (Indirects) was missing. This lack of broad conviction often leads to "post-auction drift," where yields trickle higher as the successful bidders try to offload their supply.
comment.raw_body: The Takeaway: The market required domestic funds (Directs) to heavy-lift this supply because broad/foreign demand (Indirects) was missing. This lack of broad conviction often leads to "post-auction drift," where yields trickle higher as the successful bidders try to offload their supply.
